title: Vanilla toggle
description: DrDonut's vanilla toggle mod that toggles vanilla features.
body:
This mod adds a customizable keybind that lets you quickly toggle several vanilla features on and off. With a single press, you can enable or disable view bobbing, dynamic FOV, AppleSkin visuals, as well as explosion and fire particle effects.

More features planned soon...

| Minecraft version            | supported               |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| 26.1.1            | ⏸️ coming soon              |
| 26.1            | ⏸️ coming soon              |
| 1.21.11            | ✅ fully supported              | 
| < 1.21.11 | ⚠️ Not tested |
